name: Doorz
short_description: Step into a world of mystery and riddles! Test your wits at every turn. Solve the riddles, unlock the doors, and uncover the truth behind this world as you journey toward the final showdown with the ultimate boss.
detailed_description:
Step into a world of mystery and riddles!

You’ve been taken from your reality and thrust into a strange, magical world with only one way forward—through doors guarded by mind-bending riddles. A mischievous, clown-like Riddle Master holds the key, testing your wits at every turn. Solve his riddles, unlock the doors, and uncover the truth behind this world as you journey toward the final showdown with the ultimate boss. Can you outsmart the Riddle Master and escape?
about_the_game:
Step into a world of mystery and riddles!

You’ve been taken from your reality and thrust into a strange, magical world with only one way forward—through doors guarded by mind-bending riddles. A mischievous, clown-like Riddle Master holds the key, testing your wits at every turn. Solve his riddles, unlock the doors, and uncover the truth behind this world as you journey toward the final showdown with the ultimate boss. Can you outsmart the Riddle Master and escape?
